title: AgentCore Managed Harness: Getting Started
summary: Amazon Bedrock AgentCore Managed Harness simplifies agent deployment by replacing container, storage, and orchestration boilerplate with declarative JSON configuration and system prompts. It provides isolated micro VMs, persistent storage, cross-session memory, model hot-swapping, and integrations with browser, code interpreter, and observability tools for building production agents.
